translations.landing.app.features.browserDesc: Open a page, collect data, save results — all in seconds. Every step timed automatically.
translations.landing.app.features.modulesDesc: Not just browser — file handling, images, web requests, databases, notifications, and more. 31 ready-to-use recipes included.
translations.landing.app.features.scheduleDesc: Re-run any workflow from the start or from any step. Change settings, pause at any point, compare results.
translations.landing.app.features.secureDesc: No internet required. No data uploaded anywhere. Your workflows and collected data stay on your machine.
translations.landing.app.features.subtitle: Real capabilities, not marketing promises
translations.landing.app.features.title: Why People Choose Flyto2
translations.landing.app.features.visualDesc: Every step is recorded with screenshots, timing, and context. When something fails, you see exactly which step and why.
translations.landing.app.hero.notifyDesc: Be the first to know when the desktop app launches.
translations.landing.app.hero.notifySuccess: You're on the list! We'll email you when it's ready.
translations.landing.app.hero.proNote: Free and open source. Pro license for advanced features.
translations.landing.app.hero.subtitle: Automate browser tasks in seconds — with screenshots at every step, timing, and one-click replay. Runs locally. Your data never leaves.
translations.landing.app.hero.title: Automate in seconds. See every step.
